roa.docketEntryComment: Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance

/CAL:SENTENCE/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 2 Y:PJ 8D/CTS:8/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/IND/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/SUSFF/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/WS/WEAP/X:AFTER 18 MONTHS OF SUCCESSFUL PROBATION, CHARGE MAYBE REDUCED TO A MISDEMEANOR/

/CAL:SENTENCE/CONTD PROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X:NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND  STAYED TO 12-03-21/X: BAIL SET AT $50,000/CONTD:FUR PROC RE BW STAY FTA SENTENCE 11-23-21 $50K/DOP/

/CAL:TO SET OR DISPO/X:PEOPLE AMEND COUNT#1 TO 25400C6PC, A FELONY/X: THEPEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT AS TO COUNT #1, TO  A PC 25400C6, A FELONY, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:#1/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:11-23-21/PPRF/REMA/ARBUCKLE/TWS/
/CAL:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/EMMOD:HOME DETENTION COMPONENT OF THE COURTS RELEASE ORDER IS TERMINATED, DEFENDANT TO REMAIN ON GPS MONITORING/CONT/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON: GEORGE BURGES/987,2/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/STWPX/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD: HOME DETENTION EXCEPT FOR JOB SEARCH AND INTERVIEWS OR WORKING/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/WEAP/WS/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/X: THESE ARE AMENDED MINUTES AS OF 02-09-21/
/CAL: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
